targets.name: RankEntropyGapLemma
targets.weakest_sufficient_object: A nontrivial quantitative inequality from registered rank/fiber growth to a uniform positive entropy or mass gap.

targets.name: FiniteToUniformUpgradeLemma
targets.weakest_sufficient_object: A compactness, monotonicity, or coercivity principle upgrading finite verified witnesses to a uniform family-level lower bound.

targets.name: LocalToGlobalRigidityTransferLemma
targets.weakest_sufficient_object: A theorem showing that admissible local rigidity certificates force global rigidity without assuming the global conclusion.

targets.name: BoundaryCompactnessCollapseControlLemma
targets.weakest_sufficient_object: An analytic compactness theorem converting finite detector algebra, spectral cutoff, finite energy, and backreaction control into boundary compactness or collapse control.

targets.name: DfmMkcExecutablePredictionBinding
targets.weakest_sufficient_object: An executable solver implementation or trusted external solver binding producing a numerical prediction vector aligned to the comparison protocol.
